calendar.matters:
Default Prove Up In Scd. (Amended To Add Aka).
Off Calendar Aug-21-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Brenda Fields.
Appearances:
Jordan Lavinsky, Esq. for Plaintiff 111 Maiden Lane L.P.
Plaintiff's Application for an Order Amending Judgment adding ALIASES of Judgment debtors, attorney's fess and costs. Exhibits submitted in open court.
The Court grants Order Amending Default Judgment to add aliases of defendants: Shu Ren Kang, Shuren Kang and Shiu Chuan Chuang. Additional attorney's fees of $2,800.00 and costs of $432.10.
Plaintifff's Application for an Order for Second Amended Judgment was heard on the merits,
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant, Robert Kang aka Shu Ren Kang, aka Shuren Kang and Silvia Kang, aka Shiu Chuan Chuang as follows:
Damages of $6,468.74
Attorney's fees of $4,250.00
Costs of $642.10
For the total of $11,360.84
Judgment signed in open court.
